name: Calvin Hendra
heroContent: Full-stack software and AI engineer with 1.5 years of end-to-end production experience in AI-powered SaaS. Comfortable owning every layer of the stack: LLM/RAG pipelines, backend APIs, frontend interfaces, ETL, and cloud deployment. Thrives in fast-moving startup environments and consistently delivers production-ready work with measurable business impact.

experiences.description:
Shipped Bati Agent — a script-injected AI sales widget — to 5 live Shopify storefronts (Cotton Ink, Torch, KamiIdea, Hijab Chic Store, Russ Simple Life), achieving 30–40% conversion rate uplift for the first client across ~10,000 daily sessions.

Built the full AI search pipeline: intent classification, NLP query parsing (Bahasa Indonesia), hybrid text-to-SQL + Qdrant vector search, and streaming SSE responses using LangChain on a multi-tenant architecture.

Developed admin dashboard and Embed SDK in Next.js 15; backend in FastAPI with PostgreSQL, Redis, and ClickHouse; ETL service (Node.js) via Shopify GraphQL Bulk Operations.

Deployed all services on AWS EC2 via Docker Compose and Caddy SSL; managed GitHub Actions CI/CD and Cloudflare DNS across all services.

Developed BatiLabs Web (React + Vite): company landing page and client onboarding portal with Shopify integration, script installation flow, and Xendit payment, deployed on AWS S3 + Cloudflare.

Financing Sales Agent Chatbot: Built a conversational AI chatbot for financial products (vehicle installment plans, loan calculations, foreign currency) using FastAPI, LangChain, RAG with Qdrant, and tool-calling for real-time financial calculations. Implemented streaming responses, Supabase data ingestion, and containerised deployment with Docker Compose; built conversation UI in Next.js.

Web-Based CRM for Relationship Managers: Developed a web-based CRM for Relationship Managers using Next.js and Node.js with JWT auth, RBAC, and PostgreSQL; built data-driven dashboards and reporting features.

certifications.description: Completed Yale University's Financial Markets course on Coursera, covering financial markets, risk management, behavioural finance, and investment principles.
Certified in backend development with Node.js, covering RESTful API design, database integration using Sequelize ORM, authentication, and middleware implementation.
Completed ITversity certification program covering core IT and software development fundamentals.

organizations.description: Participated in training sessions organised by the club, gaining valuable skills in both technical and non-technical areas

Designed posters for social media platforms using design tools to enhance promotional materials' visual appeal and Collaborated with the marketing team to ensure designs aligned with organisational branding and messaging.

Coordinated with team members to develop and execute impactful work programs, ensuring successful implementation and participated in training sessions organised by the club, enhancing hard skills and soft skills

projects.description: Script-injected AI sales widget deployed to 5 live Shopify storefronts (Cotton Ink, Torch, KamiIdea, Hijab Chic Store, Russ Simple Life). Features NLP semantic search in Bahasa Indonesia, personalised product recommendations, and a multi-tenant admin dashboard. Achieved 30–40% conversion rate uplift for the first client across ~10,000 daily sessions.

Company landing page and client onboarding portal for PT Bati Investasi Teknologi. Includes a full multi-step onboarding flow: Shopify store integration, script installation, and Xendit payment. Deployed on AWS S3 + Cloudflare.
Web-based CRM for Relationship Managers to manage client portfolios and sales workflows. Built with Next.js frontend and Node.js backend with JWT authentication, RBAC, and data-driven dashboards.
Led the development of MulaiDulu, a coaching platform aimed at empowering MSMEs and individuals to grow their businesses.
Led the development of MakanGak, a website on food options around Binus University, to assist new students in finding meals.
